summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of RoutineTracker - All 37 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. New profile management features (change password, profile update, photo upload) working correctly. Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com. Traditional login works for both rafael/admin (Level 10, 3685 XP, 24 habits) and gabriela/gabriela. App rebranded to RoutineTracker with new logo.

backend.health_endpoint: PASS - /api/health returns {status: ok, service: RoutineTracker API}
backend.login_rafael: PASS - rafael/admin login returns token, Level 10, 3685 XP
backend.login_gabriela: PASS - gabriela/gabriela login returns token with pink theme
backend.profile_get: PASS - GET /api/profile returns user info with hasPassword field
backend.change_password: PASS - POST /api/profile/change-password validates and changes password
backend.change_password_validation: PASS - Validates password strength (6+ chars, letter, number)

frontend.landing_page: PASS - Shows RoutineTracker branding with new logo
frontend.login_screen: PASS - RoutineTracker logo and branding displayed
frontend.rafael_login: PASS - Login shows dashboard with Level 10, 3,685 XP, 24 habits
frontend.profile_page: PASS - Shows email ferreira.rafah@gmail.com, edit name field, Security section
frontend.change_password_modal: PASS - Opens with password requirements validation
frontend.sidebar_branding: PASS - Shows RoutineTracker with new logo

features_tested.traditional_login_rafael: PASS - rafael/admin shows Level 10, 3685 XP, 24 habits
features_tested.traditional_login_gabriela: PASS - gabriela/gabriela works with pink theme
features_tested.change_password_button: PASS - 'Alterar senha' button visible in Security section
features_tested.change_password_modal: PASS - Modal with password requirements validation
features_tested.edit_name_field: PASS - Profile shows editable name field with Salvar button
features_tested.new_logo: PASS - New logo on landing page, login screen, sidebar

critical_code_review_comments: Google OAuth uses Emergent Auth service (auth.emergentagent.com) - MOCKED but realistic OAuth flow
Profile photo upload converts to base64 and stores in database - may need optimization for large images
Password validation enforces: 6+ chars, at least one letter, at least one number
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new profile features working correctly. Rafael has email ferreira.rafah@gmail.com linked in database. Change password feature validates password strength. Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com. App rebranded to RoutineTracker with new logo. All 37 backend tests pass.

mocked_apis.Google OAuth: Uses Emergent Auth (auth.emergentagent.com) which provides a MOCKED but realistic OAuth flow
